sglang.title: Fix CI xeon test with triton 3.3.1
sglang.author: yanbing-j
sglang.bodyExcerpt: CI Xeon test fails after @triton.autotune added in python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/fp8_kernel.py. triton 3.3.1 will run into autotune and Xeon test platform fails because it has no triton driver. But triton 3.1.0 can pass, and not run into autotune in triton. We have to add a check to bypass t

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
cuGreenCtxStreamCreate is introduced in CUDA12.5 which leads to compile failure in CUDA12.4 enviroment.
related PR:#7649

add fallback method for CUDA12.4

sglang.title: [misc] update nvshmem and pin deepEP commit hash
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Update the Docker build to use the latest NVSHMEM version 3.3.9 and improve reproducibility by pinning the DeepEP dependency to a specific commit hash.
Modifications

Updated NVSHMEM version: Upgraded from 3.2.5 to 3.3.9

Changed download URL to use nvshmem_src_cuda12-all-all-3.3.9.tar.gz

sglang.title: [Feature] Layer-wise Prefill
sglang.author: jason-fxz
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements layer-wise prefill functionality by adding a new forward_split_prefill method to all supported model architectures. This allows launching several decoder layers instead of processing the entire model at once, with intermediate states stored in the forward batch.
We will initially

sglang.title: [1/n] chore: decouple quantization implementation from vLLM dependency
sglang.author: AniZpZ
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The primary goal of this change is to enhance the consistency and stability of SGLang's quantization features. By decoupling the quantization implementation from its vLLM dependency, we aim to make the module easier to maintain and more portable.
Full realization of this goal will involve

sglang.title: feat: add tp_rank, pp_rank and dp_rank labels for scheduler metrics
sglang.author: acelyc111
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix #6892 #7305
When PP, DP or TP is enabled, the load on each scheduler maybe not balanced, but it's hard to monitor this situation.
This patch adds pp_rank, tp_rank and dp_rank labels for metrics, then the metrics look like:
sglang:gen_throughput{dp_rank="1",engine_type="unified",model

sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

After #7943, CI tests for deepseek x mtp become very flaky. This PR disables memory imbalance check for draft worker to make the CI robust.

sglang.title: [Fix] ensure DeepGEMM is only enabled for FP8_W8A8 models
sglang.author: hzh0425
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
If a user erroneously enables the ENABLE_JIT_DEEPGEMM environment variable in non-FP8 model scenarios (e.g., when using Qwen3-235B-FP16), sglang will enter a failed state during launch and sglang‘s rank scheduler will stuck at the following stack:

Purpose
Certain upstream packages that can leverage vllm deployed models require access to a model’s chat template or some information pertaining the tokenizer itself. Given that we already require an API connection to the model server, being able to get this info out of the model server would reduc

vllm.title: [fix] fix qwen image_embeds input
vllm.author: h-avsha
vllm.bodyExcerpt: As of 0.9.2, the ability to pass image_embeds directly to qwen2.5-VL is broken. The issue was introduced by #19316, and the root cause is that embeddings encoded in base64 are in float16 or float32, and model weights are in bfloat16 (the mm hasher doesn't support hashing bfloat16 embeddings as they

vllm.title: Remove Qwen Omni workaround that's no longer necessary
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR removes a workaround for Qwen Omni models which is no longer necessary on newer Transformers versions.
There have been several Transformers releases since huggingface/transformers#37517 (the condition for removing this workaround) was merged and vLLM is currently on the latest version of Tra

vllm.title: Support FP8 Quantization and Inference Run on Intel Gaudi (HPU) using INC (Intel Neural Compressor)
vllm.author: nirda7
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support to FP8 Quantization and Inference run on Intel Gaudi (HPU) using INC (Intel Neural Compressor).
Currently, quantization is validated only in Llama models.

Measurement files are required to run quantized models with vLLM on Gaudi accelerators. The FP8 model calibration procedure

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Machete zero point issue for GPTQ models on SM90
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FIX #20974 #20986
The issue was that the GPTQ caller was setting zero_points=False, however since it always allocates its qzeros param that still gets loaded into the machete kernel. We just need to filter out that case to fix.
Test Plan
Manual testing of the issue on H100

Before

Fix an issue in MultiprocExecutor where the finished_sending and finished_recving fields in aggregated worker outputs were not correctly updated. This could wrongly propagate some requests as finished even when certain workers had not reported them yet.
